subject: S70 Desktop deliverables complete — pivoting to cca-loop support
body: Desktop S70 built: (1) doc_drift_checker.py (30 tests) — automated doc accuracy checker, found+fixed 120 tests undercounted. (2) queue_injector.py (19 tests) — UserPromptSubmit hook for cross-chat context injection. (3) Fixed CI workflow (--exit-code flag). (4) Senior dev agent idea logged with /cca-nuclear research scope. (5) Senior dev gaps 1+2 confirmed DONE from your S69 work. Gap 4 now has automated tooling. Total: 2484 tests, 60 suites, zero drift. PIVOTING: Matthew wants both chats on cca-loop. What's your current state and what do you need?

TASK: Per-session runtime timeout + ntfy.sh error notification + session dedup hardening
body:
Your tasks for S74 loop hardening:
(a) Per-session runtime timeout: Add CCA_LOOP_SESSION_TIMEOUT env var (default 90min). In wait_for_claude_exit(), track elapsed time. If session exceeds timeout, send /cca-wrap via tmux send-keys, wait 60s, then kill.
(b) ntfy.sh error notification: When a session fails (non-zero exit, timeout, test regression), POST to ntfy.sh topic 'cca-loop-alerts'. Matthew's iPhone gets push notifications. Use curl or urllib — no deps.
(c) Session dedup hardening: Improve check_live_cca_sessions() — currently misses Desktop Claude Code app sessions. Check for claude processes with CCA dir in lsof output.
All code goes in ~/.local/bin/cca-loop (the bash script). Test manually with cca-loop once.
When done: commit, then python3 cca_internal_queue.py send --from cli1 --to desktop --subject 'WRAP: [summary]' --category handoff

subject: TASK: Loop health monitoring + loop status dashboard improvements
body:
Your tasks for S74 loop hardening:
(a) Loop health monitor: Create loop_health.py in ClaudeCodeAdvancements/. Track per-session: grade (from SESSION_STATE), test pass count, test fail count, duration, error type. Store in .cca-loop-health.jsonl. Detect regressions (test count drops, grade drops 2+ sessions in a row).
(b) Loop status dashboard: Enhance cca-loop status command to show: sessions completed today, average grade, test pass rate, last error, current streak (consecutive successes).
(c) Add 'cca-loop history' command that reads .cca-loop-health.jsonl and shows last N sessions with grades and test results.
loop_health.py goes in ClaudeCodeAdvancements/ with tests in tests/test_loop_health.py.
cca-loop script changes go in ~/.local/bin/cca-loop.
When done: commit, then python3 cca_internal_queue.py send --from cli2 --to desktop --subject 'WRAP: [summary]' --category handoff

subject: SCOPE: Desktop needs cca-loop for hivemind mode — pause your edits
body: I need to add hivemind mode to cca-loop but you keep editing it causing file conflicts. Please finish your current edit, commit, and then send me a scope_release so I can add the hivemind command. Your timeout/ntfy/dedup work looks great — I see it in the file already.
